title: TAS-20 factor-analytic results: LLM extractions with curator corrections
description: Curated factor-analytic extractions from 20 primary TAS-20 (Toronto Alexithymia Scale-20) studies covering 30 distinct samples. Each entry carries the model-extracted factor loadings (up to 5 factors x 20 items), factor correlations, and study/sample metadata, plus a `human_overrides[]` array that records every cell where the curator-corrected ground-truth Excel disagrees with the LLM extraction. Extracted with GPT-5.5 via the MetaPaperLens MASEMiner CFA preset; ground truth from Schroeders & Gnambs' corrected coding sheet.

verification.notes: Ground-truth values come from Schroeders & Gnambs' manually-curated coding sheet (coding_TAS-20_corrected.xlsx). The `human_overrides[]` array on each paper records the curator's corrections vs. the raw LLM extraction. Across the 30 samples, the LLM achieves 99.95% accuracy on factor loadings (1 cell mismatch in 2020), 92.9% sensitivity / 95.2% precision on factor correlations (118 correct of 127 reported, 124 LLM-extracted). 103 metadata-field overrides are LLM omissions (clinical/res/rot/met codes the model didn't extract) rather than value disagreements.

preset.title: MASEMiner — factor-analytic (CFA/EFA) extraction
preset.note: TAS-20 parameterisation: scale_name=Toronto Alexithymia Scale-20, n_items=20, n_factors=5 (capacity). Template rendered from masem.template.md.
